title: Mamdani backs DSA-endorsed congressional candidate over longtime incumbent Adriano Espaillat
content: Mayor Zohran Mamdani on Thursday threw his support behind a far-left candidate and fellow Israel basher, Darializa Avila Chevalier, to knock off five-term incum...

title: No justification for Ukraine’s ‘barbaric’ strike on college dorm – Russian envoy to UN
content: Russia criticized Ukraine at the UN Security Council for denying responsibility for last week’s deadly strike on a college dormitory

title: Spurs blow out Thunder, force Game 7 as Victor Wembanyama leads the way with 28-point double-double
content: The San Antonio Spurs blew out the Oklahoma City Thunder, 118-91, in Game 6 behind 28 points and 10 rebounds from Victor Wembanyama, forcing a decisive Game 7.
